critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx: fetchData uses Promise.allSettled correctly - one failing API won't crash dashboard
AdminDashboard.jsx: handleNewDelivery shows detailed error (error.response?.data?.detail or error.message)
SubscriptionPage.jsx: handleSelectPlan shows detailed error (error.response?.data?.detail || error.message)
AuthContext.jsx: checkAuth tries refresh before declaring not-auth
api.js: 401 interceptor does NOT redirect - only refreshes and retries, lets React Router handle auth
seed_data_creation: Created test deliveries during testing (TEST_BugFix_Recipient, UI Test Recipient)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified in iteration 9. Three mobile bugs fixed: 1) Promise.all replaced with Promise.allSettled in AdminDashboard and DriverDashboard so one failing API doesn't crash the entire dashboard. 2) All error messages now show detailed info (error.response?.data?.detail or error.message) instead of generic text. 3) 401 interceptor no longer redirects - React Router ProtectedRoute handles auth. Firestore permission errors in console are non-blocking and expected in preview environment.

mocked_apis.firestore_sync: May fail with Permission Denied in preview environment (non-blocking)

bug_1_delivery_create.original_issue: 'Erreur lors de la création' - generic error hid the real issue
bug_1_delivery_create.fix_applied: handleNewDelivery now shows: error.response?.data?.detail (array or string) or error.message
bug_1_delivery_create.verification_status: FIXED - Delivery creation works, errors show detailed validation messages

bug_2_session_expired.fix_applied: 401 interceptor no longer redirects, SubscriptionPage shows detailed error
bug_2_session_expired.verification_status: FIXED - Plan changes work without 'Session expirée', success toast appears

bug_3_promise_all.original_issue: Promise.all caused entire dashboard to crash if one API failed
bug_3_promise_all.fix_applied: Promise.allSettled used in AdminDashboard and DriverDashboard fetchData
bug_3_promise_all.verification_status: FIXED - Dashboard loads even with Firestore permission errors (non-blocking)
